market_context: Market sentiment on X/Twitter is cautiously optimistic, with many users discussing potential Fed rate decisions and tech sector strength. Pre-market futures for S&P 500 and Nasdaq are up slightly by 0.3% and 0.4% respectively, while notable movers include tech giants like NVDA with positive buzz. Major news includes an anticipated Fed statement later today, which could sway markets.

predictions.reasoning: Positive pre-market futures for S&P 500 up 0.3% suggest upward momentum. X/Twitter sentiment is leaning bullish with discussions around Fed dovishness. However, uncertainty around the Fed statement tempers confidence.

Strong positive sentiment on X/Twitter with hashtags like #NVDABull trending among retail investors. Pre-market data shows NVDA up 1.2%, and recent options flow indicates heavy call buying for March expiry. Confidence is moderate due to potential volatility from Fed news.

Mixed sentiment on X/Twitter with some users citing concerns over EV market competition. Web search highlights a recent analyst downgrade due to margin pressures. Confidence is low due to conflicting signals and potential Fed impact.
